creator: keith.gaughan@gmail.com
text:
When installing the games/alephone port, none of the sources provide the given file, giving either Forbidden or File Not Found response codes.

Fix: 

I found a copy of the file at cd http://lhowon.org/TotalTextureEnhancementv61.zip, which should be copied to ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/alephone/.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/games/alephone/
